title: knautia integrifolia var. typica
intro: Knautia integrifolia var. typica, also known as the blue spurrey or blue scorpion grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Dipsacaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Knautia integrifolia var. typica include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
